LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 301, AS TO THE JAN-30-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JEFF C.'S MOTION TO FILE UNDER SEAL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION FILED IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF JEFF C.'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO SEAL IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND OUTLINES THE TITLE OF THE DOCUMENTS TO BE PERMANENTLY SEALED, WITH THE FILING DATES AND TRANSACTION NUMBERS AS SHOWN IN THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS. LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 301, AS TO THE JAN-30-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT DENIES BLUE SHIELD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. BECAUSE BLUE SHIELD CONCEDES THAT AT LEAST SOME OF JEFF C.'S CLAIMS ARE TIMELY UNDER THE EMERGENCY RULE, THE COURT NEED NOT CONSIDER THE REMAINING ARGUMENTS RAISED BY THE PARTIES ABOUT THE ACCRUAL OF JEFF C.'S CLAIM FOR RELIEF. ORDER SIGNED (SEE WORD MINUTES/SIGNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING). JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. Off Calendar Jan-30-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. DAVID LILIENSTEIN, Esq. of DL Law Group (tel: 415-678-5050) for Plaintiff.
Atty. JASON WU, Esq. and Atty. SAVANNAH LEVIN, Esq. of Foley and Lardner LLP (tel: 415-434-4484) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Court denies Blue Shield's motion for summary judgment. Because Blue Shield concedes that at least some of Jeff C.'s claims are timely under the Emergency Rule, the court need not consider the remaining arguments raised by the parties about the accrual of Jeff C.'s claim for relief.

Order signed (see word minutes/signed order for complete ruling).

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Jane Hong, CSR# 11975 (tel: 909-831-2644 / email: csrjane@hotmail.com).
